data.title: ElfQuest Two-Spear #1 4 5 + Metamorphosis #1 WaRP Graphics Spinoff Lot
data.description:
A small lot of two ElfQuest spinoff mini-series from WaRP Graphics. Two-Spear (1995) follows the fierce and controversial elf chief Two-Spear in a story set deep in ElfQuest prehistory — this lot includes issues #1, 4, and 5 (missing #2 and #3). Also included is Metamorphosis #1 (1996), a one-shot bridging ElfQuest Past and ElfQuest Future.

Stored bagged with individual backing boards by a careful collector. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage.

Series | ElfQuest: Two-Spear + Metamorphosis
Publisher | WaRP Graphics
Two-Spear | #1, 4, 5 (missing #2 and #3)
Metamorphosis | #1
Year | 1995-1996
Condition | VF, bagged and boarded

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer. Comics are packed securely with cardboard backing to protect against bending in transit.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: ElfQuest: Two-Spear #1, 4, and 5 (WaRP Graphics, 1995) plus Metamorphosis #1 (WaRP Graphics, 1996). 4 issues total. Two-Spear missing #2 and #3. All issues individually bagged with backing boards. Condition is Very Fine throughout — no major creasing, spine rolls, or cover damage noted.
